title: Notice of opening: Off-ramp from N2-George to Louis Fourie road
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS -  The newly constructed off-ramp from the N2 (George direction) to Louis Fourie Road will be opened to traffic on 23 May 2025 (weather permitting). The temporary offramp at Shell Garage will remain in operation as an interim arrangement.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - The newly constructed off-ramp from the N2 (George direction) to Louis Fourie Road will be opened to traffic on 23 May 2025 (weather permitting). The temporary offramp at Shell Garage will remain in operation as an interim arrangement."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads. Please drive carefully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe. FOR YOU.","html":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads. Please drive carefully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe. FOR YOU."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
